carForRentSubTitle: Discover our modern, recent fleet tailored to all your needs.
LocationSubTitle1: Our team is available every day from 8 AM to 6 PM. Reservations are made by phone or directly at the agency.
LocationSubTitle2: Rent from one of our agencies in Tunisia and return your vehicle to another — comfort and freedom, without compromise.
LocationCardTitle: Abou Mazen Rent a Car Agency – Djerba Midoun
LocationCardDescription: Located in the heart of Djerba, this office welcomes you every day from 8 AM to 6 PM for all your rental needs — whether you're here for a getaway or just passing through. You can pick up and return your vehicle during these hours, with the full support of our team.
ServicesSubTitle: 8 years of trust, delivering uncompromising service.
cardSubTitle1: Quickly reserve your ideal vehicle by phone from 8 AM to 6 PM, 7 days a week, in total simplicity.
cardSubTitle2: Enjoy a professional driver for all your private or business trips, with complete peace of mind.
cardSubTitle3: Drive freely — all our vehicles come with unlimited mileage
cardSubTitle4: Fast and simple procedures for a hassle-free vehicle handover.
cardSubTitle5: Return your vehicle to the agency of your choice, with no obligation to go back to your starting point.
cardSubTitle6: Each vehicle is cleaned, disinfected, and thoroughly inspected by our partner garage to ensure safety and reliability at every rental.
cardSubTitle7: Car trouble ? Our team is available at any time, every day.
cardSubTitle8: Baby seats, boosters, and other equipment available upon request, tailored to your needs.
